vibe: Deep house, jazz, neo-soul & adjacent grooves — Ron Trent warmth meets BADBADNOTGOOD jazz fusion, Hiatus Kaiyote future soul, and Nubya Garcia spiritual jazz

tracks.name: Street Wave
tracks.reason: Adjacent to Kerri Chandler & Chris Stussy — Ron Trent is a Chicago deep house legend with that same warm, soulful groove

tracks.name: No L's
tracks.reason: Bridges the Larry June/Drake lane with jazz-rap swagger — Smino's flow sits between hip-hop and neo-soul

tracks.name: Midnight Mischief (Tom Misch Remix)
tracks.reason: Jordan Rakei x Tom Misch — electronic soul that connects to Yussef Dayes and the UK jazz scene

tracks.name: Tidal Wave
tracks.reason: Tom Misch x Yussef Dayes collab album — jazz-electronic fusion right in the sweet spot of Rusty's taste

tracks.name: L.O.V.E. - Radio Edit
tracks.reason: MCDE is adjacent to Kevin Yost & Jimpster — deep house with raw, sample-heavy Detroit warmth

tracks.name: One Wish (feat. Childish Gambino)
tracks.reason: Silky R&B that bridges the Sade/Usher lane — Ravyn Lenae with Childish Gambino on a dreamy production

tracks.name: Lake Shore Drive
tracks.reason: Detroit deep house royalty — Theo Parrish shares DNA with Osunlade, Kerri Chandler, and the soulful house crew

tracks.name: In Your Eyes
tracks.reason: Jazz-hip-hop fusion — BBNG bridges the Gorillaz/Yussef Dayes lane with instrumental grooves that slap

tracks.name: Nakamarra
tracks.reason: Future soul from Melbourne — Hiatus Kaiyote's genre-bending sits between Sade's smoothness and Gorillaz experimentation

tracks.name: The Message Continues
tracks.reason: UK jazz scene — Nubya Garcia is the spiritual jazz counterpart to Yussef Dayes, deep and meditative
